arts.ttl: Todd Cantwell 'wasn't where he wanted to be at Rangers' as Blackburn Rovers boss takes pre season potshot
arts.sum: The 26-year-old claimed he never told the Belgian he didn't want to play for the club but Eustace read between the lines and explained that his new signing wanted out because he wasn't being given the best chance to "showcase" his talents.
